title: centella tridentata var. litoralis
intro: Centella tridentata var. litoralis, also known as 'Coastal Knotweed', is a plant species that belongs to the family Apiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions, wounds, and inflammation due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Centella tridentata var. litoralis include improved wound healing, reduced inflammation, and enhanced skin health. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in water or alcohol to produce a tea or tincture that can be used topically or internally.
